prompt: Using the provided reference image of the plated dish, transform the food into a luxury fashion concept board where the dish becomes the direct design inspiration for a couture evening gown. Keep the visual DNA of the ingredients and plating: convert the light green vegetable pieces into layered flowing silk and chiffon panels, the darker greens into a sheer deep green inner layer, the reddish sausage slices into subtle rust-red piping and small accent details, the sesame seeds into delicate bead embroidery, and the blue-and-white porcelain bowl pattern into a printed scarf collar, wide waist belt, and matching handbag. Present 1 full-body female fashion model in the center wearing the dress, with 4 detail close-up panels on the right showing the back view, the waist/belt construction, the embroidery texture, and the handbag. Add a left-side editorial layout with 1 large Chinese headline, 1 English subtitle reading "Fashion Inspired by Flavor," 1 short Chinese descriptive paragraph, and 5 vertical fabric/material swatches derived from the dish colors and bowl pattern. Clean high-fashion lookbook styling, elegant studio background, premium fashion design presentation.
